positive: A mystical, stylized constellation forming a wise owl silhouette, rendered with deep indigo and glowing gold linework. The owl should be centrally composed and highly detailed, embedded within a swirling cosmic nebula background that includes minimalist stardust and geometric celestial patterns. Clean, bold lines are paramount. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau combined with modern esoteric minimalism. Excellent contrast, symmetrical composition, flat graphic design aesthetic, perfect for textile printing, clean lines, vector art quality, high detail.
